full_text:
Mao Gan 毛甘
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Mao Gan (毛甘)was born in Danyang. Leader of Chinese renegades along with Jin Qi, active in the Huangshan range of southern Danyang. Conquered by He Qi in 208.
